song: 09 - A Woman Is A Sometime Thing
comment: Published lyrics from DuBose Heyward. Bb major / G minor centred (key sig -2). Jake's verse from Porgy and Bess. Call-and-response chorus repeats three times with stacking artefacts in pipeline. Measures 32-33 have note under-detection causing lyric loss (She'll love you and / de-ceive you, Then she'll compressed). Measures 38-45 are stacked call-and-response with Guitar tacet markings garbled as directions.

4.comment: Pipeline had 'in\'' without trailing comma. Published: 'in\','.

5.comment: Pipeline dropped 'may'. Published: 'Wo-man may born— you,'.

6.comment: Pipeline dropped comma after first 'you'. Published: 'love you, an\' mourn— you,' but only 4 notes detected so 'an\'' is lost.

7.comment: Pipeline stacked 'Yes' from m10 area into this measure. Published: 'But' (held note only).

9.comment: Pipeline had spurious apostrophe on 'time\''. Published: 'wo-man is a some-time'.

11.comment: Pipeline had 2 lyrics for 3 notes. Published: 'wo-man is a some-time' but only 3 notes detected; best fit truncated.

13.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics. Published: rest then pickup 'Yo\''.

14.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics for 5 notes. Published: 'Mam-my is the first to'. 5 notes, 6 syllables; 'to' overflows to m15 pickup.

15.comment: Pipeline had 4 lyrics missing 'to' pickup from m14 overflow. Published: 'to name you, An\' she\'ll'.

20.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics, garbled direction 'pom"D'. Published: '\'Cause' (held note).

21.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics. Published: rest then pickup 'a—'.

22.comment: Pipeline had garbled '>\u00bb' and 'c'. Published: 'wo-man is a some-time'.

24.comment: Pipeline dropped 'some'. Published: 'wo-man is a some-time' but only 5 notes; truncated.

27.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics. Published: 'Don\'t you' (mf, D7).

28.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics for 7 notes. Published: 'nev-er let a wo-man'.

32.comment: Pipeline had 0 lyrics for 4 notes. Published: 'She\'ll love you and'.

33.comment: Pipeline had ['take','leave','you,'] which is from a later phrase. Published: 'de-ceive you, Then she\'ll' but only 3 notes; truncated.

34.comment: Pipeline had ['\'Cause'] but this measure position corresponds to 'take yo\' clo\'es an\' leave you,' in published. Only 3 notes; best fit truncated. '\'Cause' belongs in m35 area.

35.comment: Pipeline had ['a','de'] with garbled 'de'. Published: '\'Cause' held then pickup 'a—'. Only 4 notes; 2 meaningful lyrics.

37.comment: Pipeline had 'thing' without period. Published: 'thing.— Yes,— a'.

38.comment: Pipeline had garbled 'we' for 'wo'. Published: 'wo-man is— a' (call-and-response).

41.comment: Pipeline had 3 lyrics for 4 notes, missing 'a'. Published: 'wo-man is a'.

44.comment: STACKED 5 lyrics / 4 notes with '>|' garble. Published: 'wo-man is a' (call-and-response). Garble removed.

46.comment: Pipeline had 'thing)' with spurious parenthesis. Published: 'thing,'.

47.comment: Pipeline had 'Yes' — stacking artefact from call-and-response. Published: held whole note, no lyrics.
